entities.name: MALAWI
entities.description: The country where the research on agri-innovation delivery was conducted

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS
entities.description: The primary target group for agricultural technology and knowledge diffusion

entities.name: AGRI-INNOVATIONS
entities.description: New agricultural technologies, practices, or science solutions delivered to farmers

entities.name: FARMER-LED DELIVERY MECHANISMS
entities.description: Integrated systems for delivering agri-innovations led by farmers to improve efficiency

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL OUTPUT
entities.description: The total quantity of agricultural produce resulting from farming activities

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input, specifically observed in groundnut

entities.name: COMMUNITY SEED BANKS
entities.description: A farmer-led social network and research platform used for seed distribution and knowledge sharing

entities.name: IMPROVED SEED
entities.description: Seeds developed for better performance, distributed through delivery mechanisms

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The primary study crop used to evaluate productivity and aflatoxin levels

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A study crop used to evaluate grain yield improvements

entities.name: COMMON BEAN
entities.description: A study crop used to evaluate grain yield improvements

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain harvested per unit area for sorghum and common bean

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The level of toxic aflatoxin found in groundnut grain samples

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL EXTENSION SERVICES
entities.description: Public and private sector-led institutions providing knowledge and technology diffusion

entities.name: AGRI-INPUT DELIVERY SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems responsible for the distribution of agricultural inputs like seeds to farmers
